meaning: adj.可猜测的 可推测的
examples: Given a robust 52-bit password, you can then use a password manager to take care of the dozens of easily guessable ones used to access various web services.
But coming up with complex concatenations of alphanumeric symbols tends to be tedious and offputting, so relatively few people bother, plumping instead for simple, and easily guessable, words.
An analysis by Verizon, an American telecoms firm, found that the biggest reason for successful security breaches was easily guessable passwords.
